response.step_by_step_log: The video was identified as a musical performance. The on-screen text "Melodies Of Life" in the top-left corner, combined with audio recognition, confirmed the song title. A web search for '"Melodies of Life" Final Fantasy IX Japanese and English lyrics' was performed to retrieve the necessary lyrics. The performers were identified as virtual YouTubers Hakui Koyori and Tsunomaki Watame. The search result provided both the original Japanese lyrics and the English translation.
response.global_summary: The video is a single, continuous musical performance of the song "Melodies of Life" from the game Final Fantasy IX, performed by the virtual YouTubers Hakui Koyori and Tsunomaki Watame.

scenes.description: Virtual YouTubers Hakui Koyori and Tsunomaki Watame perform the song "Melodies of Life" on a digital stage. The title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あてもなくさまよっていた
手がかりもなくさがし続けた
あなたがくれた思い出を
心をいやす歌にして

約束もする事もなく
かわす言葉もきめたりもせず
抱きしめ、そしてたしかめた
日々は二度とかえらぬ

記憶の中の手をふるあなたは
うつりゆく時を越えて
いつまでも私の
名を呼ぶことが出来る
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I was wandering aimlessly,
Continuing to search without any clues.
Turning the memories you gave me
Into a song that soothes my heart.

Without making any promises,
Without even deciding on words to exchange,
I embraced, and then confirmed.
Those days will never return.

You, who wave your hand in my memories,
Beyond the passing of time,
You will always be able
To call my name.
